document.source_title: One playoff spot, five teams: How PBKS, RR, CSK, DC and KKR can still qualify in chaotic IPL 2026 finish

claims.claim_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad became the third team to qualify for the IPL 2026 playoffs.
claims.evidence_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad became the third team to qualify for the IPL 2026 playoffs, defeating Chennai Super Kings by five wickets.

claims.claim_text: There is only one more playoff berth left now.
claims.evidence_text: With the league phase slowly coming to an end, there is only one more playoff berth left now.

entities.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad
entities.description: A cricket team that qualified for the IPL 2026 playoffs.
entities.evidence_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad became the third team to qualify for the IPL 2026 playoffs.

entities.name: Chennai Super Kings
entities.description: A cricket team defeated by Sunrisers Hyderabad.
entities.evidence_text: defeating Chennai Super Kings by five wickets.

entities.name: Punjab Kings
entities.description: A cricket team currently in fourth position in the IPL standings.
entities.evidence_text: PBKS are currently in fourth position and RR are fifth.

entities.name: Rajasthan Royals
entities.description: A cricket team that can still qualify for the playoffs.
entities.evidence_text: Rajasthan Royals, and that is if they clinch victory in their remaining two games.

entities.name: Delhi Capitals
entities.description: A cricket team that needs specific results to qualify for the playoffs.
entities.evidence_text: DC are at 12 points in 13 games and need PBKS to lose against LSG.

entities.name: Kolkata Knight Riders
entities.description: A cricket team that needs PBKS to lose to qualify.
entities.evidence_text: KKR need PBKS to lose to LSG.

entities.name: Gujarat Titans
entities.description: A cricket team that has qualified for the playoffs.
entities.evidence_text: joining Gujarat Titans and Royal Challengers Bengaluru in the playoffs.

entities.name: Royal Challengers Bengaluru
entities.description: A cricket team that has qualified for the playoffs.
entities.evidence_text: joining Gujarat Titans and Royal Challengers Bengaluru in the playoffs.

events.event: Sunrisers Hyderabad defeats Chennai Super Kings
events.evidence_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad became the third team to qualify for the IPL 2026 playoffs, defeating Chennai Super Kings by five wickets at the Chepauk.

metrics.name: points
metrics.evidence_text: The result saw SRH get to 16 points in 13 games.

metrics.name: points
metrics.evidence_text: Punjab Kings are currently fourth with 13 points from 13 matches.

metrics.evidence_text: CSK, who are at 12 off 13 matches.
